name: EPIDERMOID CYST
definition: INFUNDIBULAR CYST = SEBACEOUS CYST (misnomer) proliferation of surface epidermal cells within a circumscribed space in the dermis INTRAOSSEOUS KERATIN CYST = IMPLANTATION CYST

demographics.Histo: production of keratin within closed space lined by surface epidermis
demographics.Associated with: nevoid basal cell syndrome (Gorlin syndrome) + high prevalence of
demographics.Path: encapsulated round / oval lesion lined by stratified squamous epithelium + filled with

dominant_finding: isointense / slightly hypointense relative to muscle on T1WI
discriminating_features: isointense / slightly hypointense relative to muscle on T1WI
hyperintense with focal areas of decreased signal on T2WI
well-defined round osteolysis with sclerotic margin

US: circumscribed circular / oval hypoechoic mass on US
round / oval an- or hypoechoic subungual mass with edge shadowing containing variably
MR: isointense / slightly hypointense relative to muscle on T1WI
hyperintense with focal areas of decreased signal on T2WI
well-defined round osteolysis with sclerotic margin
NO calcifications / periosteal reaction / soft-tissue swelling
pathologic fracture often without periosteal reaction
well-defined round lesion of intermediate T1 + T2 SI
central debris + thin peripheral rim of enhancement
scalloping of distal phalanx underlying nail bed
extensive inflammation of surrounding soft tissue ← suggestive of lesion rupture
